rulings.Case Title: JAMES D. LEWIS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 4, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 8. Defendant Hansen Mechanical Contractors, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. Defendant did not satisfy its burden of production of production that plaintiff does not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that he was exposed to asbestos attributable to defendant. Defendant¿s failure to present plaintiff¿s responses to contention discovery precludes defendant¿s reliance on the factually devoid prong of Aguilar. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES D. LEWIS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 4, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 8. Defendant Cahill Contractors Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. Defendant did not satisfy its burden of production that plaintiff does not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that he was exposed to asbestos attributable to defendant. Plaintiff¿s deposition testimony precludes defendant¿s reliance on the factually devoid prong of Aguilar. Even if defendant had sustained its burden, plaintiff¿s deposition and declaration create a triable issue whether he was exposed to asbestos-containing fireproofing attributable to defendant. Defendant¿s objections to plaintiff¿s declaration are overruled. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: LEE NIXT VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 4, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 13. Defendant Raytheon Company¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. Defendant has not satisfied its burden of production that plaintiff does not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that he was exposed to asbestos attributable to defendant. By failing to propound contention discovery, defendant did not satisfy its burden of production. Defendant¿s failure to present plaintiff¿s responses to contention discovery precludes defendant¿s reliance on the factually devoid prong of Aguilar. Plaintiff¿s objection to the declaration of Jaime Fraser are sustained. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: MATTHEW CAESAR VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, NOVEMBER 4, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 14. Defendant Kelly-Moore Paint Company Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment is denied and its alternate motion for summary adjudication is granted as to issues 1 and 2 (false representation and punitive damages). Plaintiff¿s deposition and declaration, defendant¿s responses to San Francisco General Order 129 interrogatories and Mr. Merrill¿s deposition create a triable issue whether plaintiff was exposed to asbestos-containing Paco joint compound attributable to defendant. Defendant¿s objections to plaintiff¿s declaration are overruled. Plaintiff concedes the merit of the two summary adjudication issues. = (220/HEK)
